radicchio-salad-with-creamy-tahini-and-s.name: Radicchio Salad With Creamy Tahini And Salted Sesame Seeds
instructions: Lightly crush sesame seeds in a mortar and pestle (alternatively, place seeds in a resealable plastic bag and crush with a mug) and transfer to a small bowl. Add a few generous pinches of sea salt and toss to combine. Set aside.
Toss onion and lemon juice in a large bowl; season with kosher salt and pepper. Let sit 5 minutes to lightly pickle.
Meanwhile, mix yogurt, tahini, and 2 Tbsp. water in another small bowl until smooth; season tahini dressing with kosher salt and pepper.

Add radicchio to bowl with onion and drizzle with oil. Toss to coat; season with kosher salt and pepper. Transfer salad to a platter and drizzle with tahini dressing. Sprinkle reserved salted sesame seeds over salad.

raisin-cookies-lezzet.name: Raisin Cookies
instructions: 1. Cook chicken, sugar, vanilla and egg in a bowl.
2. Then add flour, salt, carbonate, oatme, raisin and orange confection.
3. Return to the shape of Baton and relax half an hour in the refrigerator.
4. Then shape by cutting with round die.
5. Pre-heated 180 degree cook in oven.
6. Serve dried grapes into the plate you put on the vines.
7.  Afiyet olsun.
8. What are the Tricks of the Dry Grape Cookie Recipe? Take care of the butter and egg at room temperature for the preparation.
9. To reduce calorie value, you can use full wheat flour instead of white flour.
10. You can add different fruit pieces into the cookie.

ramp-and-walnut-pistou.name: Ramp And Walnut Pistou
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool. Coarsely chop; place in a medium bowl.

Heat a dry medium cast-iron skillet over high. Add ramps and cook, turning occasionally, until bulbs and greens are evenly charred. Remove from skillet and let cool. Coarsely chop and add to bowl with walnuts. Add oil and vinegar and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Pistou (without vinegar) can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Add vinegar just before serving.

razzle-dazzle.name: Razzle Dazzle

ingredients.item: Orange half-moon and lightly crushed raspberries

instructions: Blend 6 oz. fresh raspberries (about 1½ cups) and 1 cup sherry vinegar in a blender on low speed just to smash berries, about 5 seconds. Pour into a resealable container and let sit at room temperature at least 4 hours or up to overnight.

Strain raspberry mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into another airtight container (you should have about 1 cup). Cover and chill until ready to use.
Do ahead: Raspberry vinegar can be made 1 month ahead. Keep chilled.
Fill a glass about two thirds full with crushed, cracked, or pebble ice. Add 1½ oz. chilled club soda.

Combine 1½ oz. fresh pineapple juice, ½ oz. fresh lemon juice, ½ oz. simple syrup, and ½ oz. raspberry vinegar in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake until just chilled, about 5 seconds.
Strain into prepared glass and stir to combine. Mound crushed ice to form a rounded peak on top. Top with orange half-moon and lightly crushed raspberries (if using).

recipe-for-beef-ribs-in-green-sauce-come.name: Recipe For Beef Ribs In Green Sauce
recipe-for-beef-ribs-in-green-sauce-come.original_name: Receta de costillas de res en salsa verde

ingredients.item: 900 gr costillas de cerdo (enteras o en trocitos)
3  dientes de ajos (2 sin pelar y 1 pelado)
2 cda  aceite vegetal  (o manteca de cerdo derretida)

instructions: In a large pot lays the ribs and adds the polished garlic tooth, the laurel and 1 / 4 onion leaf, cover with water all the ingredients.
Deja que hierva a fuego medio-alto, luego reduce a fuego lento.
Let them cook for about 40 minutes, check that water has been reduced and meat's tender.
It purifies with medium-high heat a large frying pan or a paddle, pits up chilies, tights and 1 / 3 onion with both teeth of unpeeled garlic.
Retire the roasted vegetables from the frying pan and put them into an aluminum paper so they will continue to cook with their own steam for about 5 minutes.
Agrega el cilantro picado y las verduras asadas al vaso de la licuadora y licuamos hasta que todo quede bien molido.
When you see that the meat is cooked and slightly golden, just add the vegetable oil, as you see the hot oil empty the salsa in the pot and we season with pepper and salt, let them sink.
Reduce el fuego a lento y dejas que se cocine por unos 7 a 8 minutos.
Enjoy this delicious preparation.

recipe-for-fruit-neapolitans-with-pastry.name: Recipe For Fruit Neapolitans With Pastry Cream
recipe-for-fruit-neapolitans-with-pastry.original_name: Receta de napolitanas de frutas con crema pastelera
instructions: In a bowl we add milk (Reserve 50 ml. to dilute maicena), egg yolks, brown sugar, and a few drops of vanilla essence.
Calentamos a fuego suave y vamos removiendo  con unas varillas sin dejar que hierva.
Diluye en la leche la maicena y agrega poco a poco a la leche caliente.
Bate con las varillas hasta que espese.
Coloca la crema en un bol y tapa con papel film cuidando de que no quede aire.
When at room temperature, we put into the refrigerator until completely cold.
We scattering the pint dough, we'll cut some rectangles that we'll fill with cream and some fruit cut to taste.
Envolvemos y pintamos con huevo batido la masa.
We baked about 15 min at 180 °

recipe-for-golden-pork-rind-tacos-comede.name: Recipe For Golden Pork Rind Tacos
recipe-for-golden-pork-rind-tacos-comede.original_name: Receta de tacos dorados de chicharrón
instructions: Warm up tortillas with a frying pan or microwave to make them flexible.
Add a portion of pressurized jug at the centre of the omelette and roll up very well. Hold with chopsticks.
Warm a frying pan with vegetable oil.
When at temperature, fry the tacos well till they get doradito.
Once all the tacos are golden put them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
Serve and decorate with lettuce, broken cheese and sour cream. Enjoy!

recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-blue-chee.name: Recipe For Onions Stuffed With Blue Cheese And Walnuts
recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-blue-chee.original_name: Receta de cebollas rellenas de queso azul y nueces
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Pela muy bien las cebollas y corta un poco la parte superior e inferior para que puedan mantenerse firmes.
Withdraw with a knife or spoon, part of the centre of the onion. That will let you have more space to fill.
En un bol incorpora la mantequilla, las nueces troceadas, el queso azul desmenuzado. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
It's a good mix till you get a dough. Fill up the onions till they have a good share of blue cheese and nuts.
Cubre las cebollas con papel aluminio, coloca en una bandeja y lleva al horno.
Wet the onions for about 10 to 12 minutes or until they are soft and doradite.
Una vez listas, deja reposar un poco y disfruta.

recipe-for-scorpionfish-stew-with-potato.name: Recipe For Scorpionfish Stew With Potatoes And Tomatoes
recipe-for-scorpionfish-stew-with-potato.original_name: Receta de guiso de cabracho con patatas y tomates

ingredients.item: 1  cabracho de aproximadamente 1 kg  (limpio y en trozos grandes)
500 gr de patatas (cortadas en rodajas gruesas)

instructions: Si se dispone de la cabeza y espinas del cabracho, hervirlas con una zanahoria, un trozo de cebolla y una hoja de laurel en 1 litro de agua durante 25 minutos. Colar y reservar.
In a large casserole, heat 3 tablespoons of olive oil and soften onion with medium-low heat until clear.
Add garlic and red pepper and cook a few more minutes.
Incorporate the grated tomato and cook with a low heat until the liquid is reduced and the sodith is focused (about 10-15 minutes).
Agregar las patatas y remover para que se impregnen de los sabores del sofrito.
Sprinkle and add the white wine. Let them have a few minutes.
Verter el caldo de pescado caliente hasta cubrir las patatas, junto con el laurel y el tomillo.
Cover and let cook with medium heat for 20- 25 minutes, till the potatoes are tender.
Rectificar de sal y pimienta.
To place the pieces of cunt onto the potatoes and make sure they are partially submerged into the stock.
Cocinar a fuego medio-bajo durante 5-7 minutos, sin remover demasiado para no deshacer el pescado.
If desired, add a touch of brandy or saffron strands to enhance the taste.
Dejar reposar el guiso 5 minutos antes de servir. Espolvorear con hinojo fresco o perejil picado.

recipe-for-stewed-pinto-beans-with-chori.name: Recipe For Stewed Pinto Beans With Chorizo
recipe-for-stewed-pinto-beans-with-chori.original_name: Receta de judías pintas estofadas con chorizo

ingredients.item: Trozo un de tocino de unos 10 cms de largo

instructions: The previous night you have to put the beans into a big bowl with water and a pint of salt. Give them enough water because they'll grow up.
Piece onion, pepper and garlic into small cubes and reserve.
Pica los chorizo en 3 o 4 partes y el tocino igual.
Put the beans soaked from the previous day into a big pot with cold water. They should be covered about 4 fingers above them.
Put the pot to heat up with maximum heat till it starts boiling. At this point you're gonna put the fire down in half and cover up the pot. Let's cook for 20 minutes.
Once time goes by adds the bacon. Recover and keep boiling. Let's have about 20 more minutes.
It's good that you check the fire, some kitchens are more powerful than others. Ideally, it boils moderately, without a very soft bubbling and also bad.

While cooking the pint beans you can make the sodand: in a large frying pan add enough olive oil and make a classic sodith with onion, garlic and pepper. Let her get high and hot and get burned. Add a small pint of salt and put out the fire.
Back to the pot. Add the chorizo, the whole unminced mug, a tablespoon of smoked powder, salt and pepper. Recover and wait another while.

Calculates about 20 to 30 minutes and checks how salt is (and adds if necessary and tests the grain, should have been soft by now. Otherwise cover and keep cooking. If in fact it's soft, add carrot and frying. Fold well, put the fire down and let them cook another while.
When the carrot's soft and the soft grain looks butter, then your pint bean potting's ready.
Apaga el fuego y deja reposar 10 minutos antes de servir.
Sirve esta maravillosa comida con abundante aceite de oliva.

recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-chorizo.name: Recipe For Zucchini Stuffed With Chorizo
recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-chorizo.original_name: Receta de calabacines rellenos de chorizo
instructions: Cut the scuba into small cubes.
Corta la parte superior de los calabacines redondos y, con la ayuda de una cuchara, retira la semilla y parte de la pulpa.
Desecha las semillas y corta finamente la pulpa que retiraste.
Peel the onion and cut into small pieces. Do the same with your tomato and snap your garlic teeth.
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil and spray your garlic and onion for a few minutes.
Incorporates the tomato and pumpkin that you clicked. Lazona with little salt and pepper to taste. Meg and cook for two minutes.
Agrega la pulpa del chorizo, mezcla y termina de cocinar de 5 a 7 minutos o hasta que quede bien cocido.
Preheat oven at 200 ° C
Rellena los calabacines con el chorizo y espolvorea el queso mozzarella rallado.
Place the pumpkins on a plate and baker for about 3 minutes at 180 ° C or till the pumpkins are tender and the cheesebackish.
Once ready, remove from the oven and serve. Enjoy!

recipe-to-prepare-boneless-bbq-comedera.name: Recipe To Prepare Boneless Bbq
instructions: In a pot melt butter with medium heat and pits onion and garlic tooth with a small mince till golden
Add ketchup, Spanish sauce, honey, mustard, pepper and sugar
Revisa la sal y corrige de ser necesario
Corta la pechuga en cubitos
Saxony chicken with salt, pepper and oregan to taste
Bate los huevos
Coloca la harina y los huevos en recipientes separados
Pasa los cubitos de pollo sazonados por la harina y el huevo batido
Fry them for a few minutes in hot oil
Drain excess chicken oil and drink them with your BBQ sauce

recipe-to-prepare-creamy-potato-soup-com.name: Recipe To Prepare Creamy Potato Soup
recipe-to-prepare-creamy-potato-soup-com.original_name: Receta para preparar sopa cremosa de papa
instructions: Peel the bacon and fry it into a pot
When crisp remove from the pot and reserve
Also remove the fat from the bacon
En la misma olla, ya sin el tocino, derrite la mantequilla
Add onion and well minced garlic and sock
Once the onion is clear, add the flour and mix well
Add chicken stock and milk
Mezcla bien todo por un minuto y agrega las papas picadas en cubitos
Cocina a fuego medio-bajo por 25 minutos
Salpimienta al gusto
Add sour cream, onions and bacon
Agrega el queso y revuelve por unos tres minutos hasta que se haya incorporado bien
Sirve y disfruta

red-harissa.name: Red Harissa

ingredients.item: Kosher salt plus more for seasoning
Freshly ground black pepper plus more for seasoning

instructions: Roast peppers in broiler or directly over gas flame, turning occasionally, until charred all over. Transfer to a large bowl, cover, and let stand 15 minutes. Stem, peel, and seed peppers; coarsely chop.

Place peppers, next 4 ingredients, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper in a food processor. Purée until very smooth. With machine running, gradually add oil. Season to taste with additional salt and pepper, if desired.

red-salad-with-pickled-beet-vinaigrette.name: Red Salad With Pickled Beet Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Mixed red and purple raw fruits and vegetables (such as tomatoes
ingredients.prep: plums, berries, radishes, beets, rainbow carrots, and watermelon), halved, sliced, and/or cut into wedges

ingredients.item: Verjus is a tart juice made from unripe grapes. you can find it at specialty foods stores and online.

instructions: Bring beets, star anise, verjus, salt, and 1 cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook beets, adding water as needed to keep them covered, until tender, 30−40 minutes. Let cool.
Remove beets from brine with a slotted spoon and rub with paper towels to remove skins. Set beets aside. Reserve brine separately.
Do Ahead: Beets can be pickled 3 days ahead. Return beets to brine; cover and chill.
Toast pumpkin seeds in a dry small skillet over medium-high heat, tossing occasionally, until golden brown and puffed, about 3 minutes. Let cool.

Process anchovies, garlic, Parmesan, basil, oil, lemon juice, and 2 pickled beets in a food processor until smooth; season with salt and pepper. With motor running, thin vinaigrette with reserved brine to a pourable consistency. Add pumpkin seeds and pulse until coarsely ground.
To serve, spoon some vinaigrette into a shallow bowl and arrange fruits and vegetables of choice on top. Season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

red-snapper-with-sambal.name: Red Snapper With Sambal
instructions: Using a very sharp blade, draw a knife down the length of 1 snapper fillet to make parallel ¼" deep cuts spaced ½" apart from end to end. Cutting on a diagonal (or crosswise), make parallel cuts to create ½" diamonds or squares in a crosshatch pattern. Repeat with remaining snapper fillets.

Season both sides of snapper with salt. Place on a rimmed baking sheet. Combine garlic, fish sauce, lime juice, chili paste, and brown sugar in a small bowl; spoon over snapper, making sure marinade penetrates score marks.
Heat broiler. Drizzle snapper with oil and broil until charred in spots and cooked through, about 5 minutes. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

reuben-dutch-baby.name: Reuben Dutch Baby
instructions: Real Talk: The key to getting a big, light, puffy rise is to make sure the flour is thoroughly incorporated into the egg mixture. Whisk your arm off until zero, absolutely zero, clumps remain.

Place a 10" cast-iron skillet in oven; preheat to 425°. Whisk eggs, milk, and 1 tsp. mustard in a medium bowl until smooth. Whisking constantly, gradually add flour, whisking until smooth; season with salt. Stir in half of cheese and ½ tsp. pepper.

Carefully remove preheated skillet from oven and add butter; swirl skillet to coat. Drape half of pastrami into skillet (it’s okay if it bends and folds over itself); season with salt and pepper. Pour egg mixture over. Return skillet to oven and bake until Dutch baby is puffed and golden brown, 12–15 minutes.
Remove skillet from oven and heat broiler (do not fear the broiler). Drape remaining pastrami over Dutch baby; top with remaining 2 oz. cheese. Broil until cheese is melted, about 3 minutes.
Top with sauerkraut and mustard before serving.

rhubarb-pudding-cake.name: Rhubarb Pudding Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.

Combine cake mix, 1 cup water, eggs, and oil in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer on low speed until moistened. Increase speed to medium and beat for 2 minutes. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan. Top with rhubarb; sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon.
Place remaining 1 cup water in a microwave-safe measuring cup; microwave until hot. Pour hot water evenly over cake.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean or with moist crumbs, 50 to 60 minutes.

roast-beef-with-vegetables-teleculinaria.name: Roast Beef With Vegetables
instructions: Leve ao lume uma frigideira com 3 colheres (sopa) do azeite e deixe aquecer.
Add the roast beef and let it cook from all sides until it gets golden.
Retire a carne da frigideira, coloque-a num tabuleiro de forno e salpique com sal.
Then season with ground pepper at the time.
Junte os alhos, previamente descascados e laminados...

.. And spread over rosemary twigs. Take it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, for 15 minutes. Meanwhile, get the vegetables, cut them to taste, and salt them in the rest of the olive oil, seasoning them with salt and pepper. Cut the roast beef into slices and serve with sautéed vegetables.

roast-chicken-dinner-with-gravy.name: Roast Chicken Dinner With Gravy

ingredients.item: College inn® unsalted bold chicken stock

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Arrange an oven rack in lower third of oven with no racks above it.

Place potatoes, carrots, thyme, and rosemary in a 12-inch cast-iron or other oven-safe deep skillet. Season with salt and black pepper; pour in 1 cup stock. Rub chicken skin with olive oil; season with salt and black pepper. Place chicken, breast-side-up, on top vegetables.

Roast in the preheated oven until no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, 60 to 75 minutes, basting with pan juices every 20 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).
Transfer chicken to a platter, draining juices from cavity into the pan. Arrange vegetables around chicken on the serving platter using a slotted spoon.

Bring pan drippings to a simmer over medium heat. Whisk in flour, whisk constantly for 1 minute. Whisk in remaining 1 cup stock until smooth; simmer until thickened, about 2 minutes. If too thick, whisk in more stock, 2 tablespoons at a time, until reaches desired consistency. Stir in cream; season with salt and black pepper.
Carve chicken; serve with vegetables and gravy.

roast-goat-with-rice-teleculinaria.name: Roast Goat With Rice
instructions: Fix and cut the goat into pieces by removing its larger bones, throw them in a bowl and season them with 3 of the chopped garlic teeth, white wine, laurel leaves, sweet pepper, parsley branch, salt and pepper. Involve and let marinate for an hour.

Boil 2 liters of water with broths until dissolved, remove from the fire and reserve. Lay the goat on the tray, water with the marinade and half the olive oil, dispose of the lard on top in pieces and bring it to the oven preheated at 180oC, watering with the broth slowly, for about 50 minutes or until it is roasted. Remove from the oven and book in hot place.

Peel and wash the onions and the other garlic and pinch them. Remove the bacon rind and cut it into cubes. Lay 7 dl of the meat broth left over for a pot, add 3 dl of the roasting sauce to the goat and also the saffron, take it to the fire and let it warm. Take another pot to the fire with the remaining olive oil, onion, garlic and bacon and let it saute, stirring from time to time, until it gets golden. Then add the rice, wrap it, let it warm well, water it with the mixture of broth, stir it, cover it and bring it to the oven at 180oC for 20 minutes. Remove from the oven, stir to release, lay on a platter, dispose of the goat on top and serve with the remaining roasting sauce aside.

roasted-beet-salad-with-feta.name: Roasted Beet Salad With Feta

ingredients.prep: trimmed, leaving 1 inch of stems attached

instructions: Wrap each beet individually in aluminum foil and place onto a baking sheet.
Roast beets in preheated oven until tender when pierced with a fork, 45 minutes to 1 hour. Let beets cool until easy to handle; peel and slice into 1/4-inch slices.
While beets are roasting, whisk shallots, parsley, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and red wine vinegar together in a bowl until blended; season with salt and pepper and set aside.
Place warm, sliced beets onto a serving dish; pour vinaigrette over the beets and sprinkle with feta cheese.

roasted-broccoli-with-tahini.name: Roasted Broccoli With Tahini
instructions: Preheat oven to 450˚F (230˚C).
On a parchment paper-lined baking sheet, cover broccoli in olive oil and toss to coat evenly.
Season with salt and lemon zest and roast for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
Serve with tahini sauce.
Enjoy!

roasted-carrots-with-cheese-teleculinari.name: Roasted Carrots With Cheese
instructions: Lay the olive oil in a bowl and add the mustard, the lemon scrap, the powdered ginger, the chopped garlic, salt and pepper. Mix it up nicely.
Place the carrots on a tray, water with the previous preparation and spread over the goat cheese, cut into pieces.
Take it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 10 minutes. Remove from the oven, sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve immediately.

roasted-eggplant-recipe-lezzet.name: Roasted Eggplant Recipe

ingredients.item: The classic iri bostan pound can be mixed with snowy pound, ryed alacali pound or paprika.
A lighter flavor for sacs in the oven or in the villageou can.
You can use mixed pomegranate sour with oil or lemon juice in the place of the month.
If you like a smoked aroma, you can add a few after a few drops of tahin.
Garlic can be preferred in the fresh onion or dry min, which is finely chopped instead of i&ccedil.
For mole crushed is also a great alternative.
It can be used in the sea salt or athesia salt instead of classic salt.
Dietants can be added from only instead of lemon juice.
u can add yogurt, garlic and Walnut mixture to convert mole appetizer.
By adding tomato, pepper, olive oil and lemon, you can make the salad of eggplant.
If the meat is served in the middle of the food, you can taste by spreading cake or kimyon.

instructions: 1. Wash and dry eggplants thoroughly.
2. In January: Patlıcans direct quarry translate by mole.
3. Cook all about 15–20 minutes until I start to decide.
4. In the oven: Heat the oven to 200°C’ye.
5. Patlıcans index to the tray and cook until about 20–25 minutes, completely decided on the shells.
6. Mangalda: If you cook in the hook, cook sacs in the molcall in the wire cook for 15 minutes.
7. carefully peel the shells of pear eggplants.
8. (It's easy to be warm.
9. )Begined patl cans in a bowl.
10. Ü cruise the olive oil, add salt and mix it with snacks.
11. 11. 11. 11. Kö pounds with parsley or fresh mint can wealth.

roasted-french-style-potatoes.name: Roasted French-style Potatoes

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Peel and cut the potatoes into 1/2-inch strips.
Fill a medium bowl with cold water and soak cut potatoes for 15 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil and spray with cooking oil.
Remove the potatoes from the water and dry well.
Combine white wine, oil, thyme, garlic, salt, and pepper in a bowl and mix well. Add potatoes and toss to coat. Spread out potatoes on the prepared baking sheet in a single layer without touching.
Roast in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Turn and continue roasting, turning occasionally, until potatoes are golden brown, an additional 15 to 20 minutes.

roasted-garlic-herb-sauce.name: Roasted Garlic Herb Sauce
instructions: Heat a medium, dry, heavy skillet (preferably cast iron) over medium. Roast garlic, stirring occasionally, until skins have darkened on all sides and cloves inside are soft, 12–15 minutes. Let cool.
Peel away skins and discard; transfer cloves to a blender. Add parsley, mint, oil, lemon zest and juice, red pepper, and salt. Blend until a pesto-like sauce forms.
Sauce can be made 5 days ahead; store in an airtight container and chill, or freeze up to 1 month.

roasted-leg-of-lamb-with-yukon-gold-pota.name: Roasted Leg Of Lamb With Yukon Gold Potatoes

ingredients.item: Coarse kosher salt plus additional for sprinkling
Fresh rosemary leaves plus 2 tablespoons finely chopped
- to 8-pound bone-in whole leg of lamb

instructions: Pound garlic and 4 teaspoons coarse salt in mortar with pestle until paste forms. Add 1/4 cup rosemary leaves and lemon peel. Pound 1 minute. Stir 1/4 cup oil, lemon juice, and 2 teaspoons pepper into rosemary paste.

Place lamb, fat side up, on work surface. Cut shallow slits in fat about 1/2 inch apart. Spread 5 tablespoons rosemary paste over lamb, working into slits. Turn lamb over; repeat, cutting slits and spreading with remaining paste. Wrap lamb in plastic.
Place in roasting pan; chill overnight. Preheat oven to 218°C. Remove lamb from pan; brush pan with oil. Remove plastic wrap from lamb; return to roasting pan, fat side up. Roast lamb 15 minutes.
Place potatoes in large bowl. Add 1/4 cup oil and 2 tablespoons chopped rosemary. Sprinkle with salt and pepper; toss to coat.

Reduce oven temperature to 177°C. Arrange potatoes, cut side down, in roasting pan around lamb. Roast 40 minutes. Using spatula, carefully turn potatoes over; brush with pan drippings. Roast until potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes longer. Transfer potatoes to platter. Continue to roast lamb until instant-read thermometer registers 54°C to 57°C when inserted into thickest part, about 15 to 30 minutes longer, depending on thickness. Transfer lamb to platter; let rest 20 minutes. While lamb rests, return potatoes to pan; warm in oven 10 minutes to heat through.
Arrange potatoes and lamb on platter.

roasted-potatoes-and-brussels-sprouts.name: Roasted Potatoes And Brussels Sprouts
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a large baking sheet with foil.

Combine potatoes and Brussels sprouts in a large bowl. Sprinkle lemon pepper and seasoned salt over the top and toss to coat. Drizzle olive oil over the top and toss until evenly combined. Spread out onto the prepared baking sheet in a single layer.
Cook in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Using a spatula, flip vegetables over and continue cooking until desired browning is achieved, about 15 more minutes.

roasted-pumpkin-and-goat-cheese-crostini.name: Roasted Pumpkin And Goat Cheese Crostini

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

ingredients.prep: white and light green parts only, thinly sliced

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Pile the diced pumpkin on the prepared baking sheet. Drizzle with 1 tablespoon oil and toss with your hands to lightly coat. Spread evenly and sprinkle with sage, salt, and pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until tender, about 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, melt butter in a medium frying pan over medium heat. Add leek and cook until softened and beginning to caramelize, 5 to 7 minutes. Remove roasted pumpkin from the oven, add to the pan, and stir to combine.
Preheat an outdoor grill for high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Slice the baguette at an angle into 1/2-inch slices. Brush 1 side of each slice with remaining oil.
Cook on the preheated grill until lightly browned, about 1 1/2 minutes per side.

Remove from the grill and rub the garlic clove over the oiled side of each baguette slice 3 to 4 times. Spread goat cheese over each slice and top with a spoonful of the pumpkin-leek mixture. Drizzle lightly with balsamic glaze and serve immediately.

roasted-tomatillo-and-avocado-salsa.name: Roasted Tomatillo And Avocado Salsa

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, ribs and seeds removed if desired
halved lengthwise, ribs and seeds removed
husks removed, rinsed, halved, quartered if large

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Place 1 large onion, quartered, 2 jalapeños, halved lengthwise, ribs and seeds removed if desired, 1 poblano chile, halved lengthwise, ribs and seeds removed, and 8 oz. tomatillos (about 5 medium), husks removed, rinsed, halved, quartered if large, on a large rimmed baking sheet; drizzle with 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil and season with 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Toss to coat and arrange in an even layer. Roast until tomatillos burst and are jammy and onion and chiles are tender and blistered in spots, 17–22 minutes. Let cool.

Transfer vegetables to a food processor. Add 2 medium ripe avocados, coarsely chopped, 1 garlic clove, coarsely chopped, ⅓ cup coarsely chopped cilantro, and 6 Tbsp. fresh lime juice and process until smooth. Taste salsa and season with more salt if needed.
Transfer salsa to a small bowl and serve with plantain chips for dipping.

roasted-tomato-soup-and-grilled-cheese.name: Roasted Tomato Soup And Grilled Cheese
instructions: Make the Roasted Tomato Soup: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, toss together the tomatoes, olive oil, onion, garlic, Savory spice blend, salt, and pepper.
Arrange the tomatoes cut-side down on the prepared baking sheet and spread the onions and garlic around the pan in a single layer.
Roast for 40 minutes, until the tomatoes have wrinkled. Leave the oven on for making the grilled cheeses.

In a large pot over medium-high heat, combine the roasted vegetables, vegetable stock, and rice. Bring to a boil, then cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for 20 minutes, until the rice is tender. Add the diced tomatoes and balsamic vinegar and stir to combine.

While the soup simmers, make the Grilled Cheese; Spread 1 tablespoon of softened butter on one side of each slice of bread. Flip the bread so the buttered side faces down, then sprinkle the other side of each slice with ¼ teaspoon of the Savory spice blend. Layer the cheddar and Havarti cheeses on 4 slices of bread, then close the sandwiches with the remaining slices of bread, buttered side out.
Toast the sandwiches, buttered side down, in a large pan over medium heat until golden brown, about 2 minutes. Flip and repeat on the other side, then transfer to a baking sheet.
Transfer the grilled cheeses to the oven for 5-10 minutes, until the cheese is gooey and fully melted.
Remove the soup pot from the heat, then purée the soup with an immersion blender until completely smooth and creamy.
Ladle into bowls and top with basil. Cut the grilled cheese sandwiches in half on the diagonal and serve warm alongside the soup.
Enjoy!

romano-beans-with-mustard-vinaigrette.name: Romano Beans With Mustard Vinaigrette
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.
Cook Romano beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until bright green and tender, 8–10 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a bowl of ice water and let cool. Drain and pat dry.
Meanwhile, mix vinegar, mustard, garlic, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl to combine. Let sit 10 minutes for flavors to come together.
Add walnuts and Romano beans to dressing. Finely zest lemon over beans and add parsley. Season with salt and lots of pepper and toss to coat. Transfer to a platter and drizzle with more oil.
